sentences.sentence: Natural latex, or rubber, comes from the sap of rubber trees.
sentences.translation: 天然乳胶，也就是橡胶，来自橡胶树的树液。

structure.text: from the sap of rubber trees

difficult_points: or rubber 是插入的同位语，对 Natural latex 做进一步解释说明。
comes from 表示“来源于”。

sentences.sentence: Native to the Amazon region of South America, they had long been a Brazilian monopoly, and the boom in wild rubber had made many remote jungle towns rich, until thousands of seeds of the tree were smuggled out by an entrepreneurial Brit, Henry Wickham.
sentences.translation: 橡胶树原产于南美洲的亚马逊地区，长期以来一直是巴西的垄断资源，野生橡胶的繁荣一度让许多偏远的丛林小镇变得富裕，直到一位善于经营的英国人亨利·威克姆把数千颗橡胶树种子偷运出境。

structure.text: Native to the Amazon region of South America
and the boom in wild rubber had made many remote jungle towns rich
until thousands of seeds of the tree were smuggled out by an entrepreneurial Brit, Henry Wickham

difficult_points: Native to... 是句首形容词短语，说明 they（橡胶树）的原产地，相当于 Being native to...。
made many remote jungle towns rich 是“make + 宾语 + 形容词”结构，表示“使……变得富裕”。
until 引导时间状语从句，说明繁荣持续到种子被偷运出境为止。

sentences.sentence: These were used to start plantations throughout British East-Asia, where the trees, facing none of their natural insect or fungal enemies, thrived.
sentences.translation: 这些种子被用来在英属东亚各地开辟种植园，在那里，橡胶树由于不用面对天敌昆虫或真菌，长势格外旺盛。

structure.text: to start plantations throughout British East-Asia
where the trees, facing none of their natural insect or fungal enemies, thrived
facing none of their natural insect or fungal enemies

difficult_points: These 指代前一句提到的 seeds（种子）。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 British East-Asia，说明橡胶树在那里的生长情况。
facing none of... 是现在分词短语作插入的伴随状语，说明橡胶树茁壮成长的原因。

sentences.sentence: Thus, the Brazilian rubber boom crashed, leaving control of the world's supplies with the plantation owners in Malaysia (where to this day, most of the world's natural rubber is still produced).
sentences.translation: 因此，巴西的橡胶繁荣崩溃了，全球供应的控制权落入了马来西亚种植园主手中（时至今日，世界上大部分天然橡胶仍产自那里）。

structure.text: leaving control of the world's supplies with the plantation owners in Malaysia
where to this day, most of the world's natural rubber is still produced

difficult_points: Thus 表示结果，承接上文种子被偷运出境这一事件。
leaving... 是现在分词短语作结果状语，说明繁荣崩溃带来的后果。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 Malaysia，插入说明该地至今仍是天然橡胶主产地。

sentences.sentence: But in the late 1920s, the automobile tycoon, Henry Ford, had a vision.
sentences.translation: 但在20世纪20年代末，汽车大亨亨利·福特有了一个构想。
difficult_points: But 承接上文，引出与前文巴西/马来西亚橡胶格局相对的新情节。
Henry Ford 是插入的同位语，说明 the automobile tycoon 具体是谁。

sentences.sentence: He believed in vertical integration—that is, a supply chain of car parts and products united through his ownership.
sentences.translation: 他信奉垂直整合——也就是通过自己的所有权，将汽车零部件和产品的供应链统一起来。

structure.text: that is, a supply chain of car parts and products united through his ownership

difficult_points: that is 用于解释说明前面的术语 vertical integration，意为“也就是说”。
united through his ownership 是过去分词短语，修饰 a supply chain，说明这条供应链是如何被整合统一的。

sentences.sentence: With his factories producing hundreds of thousands of cars, each of them needing rubber tyres, Ford wanted his own source of rubber and resented dealing with the British plantation interests.
sentences.translation: 由于他的工厂生产着数十万辆汽车，每一辆都需要橡胶轮胎，福特想要拥有自己的橡胶来源，并且厌恶与英国种植园利益集团打交道。

structure.text: With his factories producing hundreds of thousands of cars
each of them needing rubber tyres
wanted his own source of rubber
and resented dealing with the British plantation interests
dealing with the British plantation interests

difficult_points: With his factories producing... 和 each of them needing... 是两个独立主格结构，说明背景原因。
wanted 和 resented 是并列谓语，共用主语 Ford。
resent doing 表示“厌恶/憎恶做某事”。

sentences.sentence: He therefore decided to buy a huge tract of Amazonian rainforest, where he would transplant his American workers and lifestyle, in order to make the largest rubber plantation on the planet.
sentences.translation: 他因此决定买下亚马逊雨林中的一大片土地，把美国工人和生活方式搬迁到那里，以便建成全球最大的橡胶种植园。

structure.text: to buy a huge tract of Amazonian rainforest
where he would transplant his American workers and lifestyle
in order to make the largest rubber plantation on the planet

difficult_points: where 引导定语从句，修饰 rainforest，说明福特打算在那片雨林中做什么。
in order to 引导目的状语，说明买地和搬迁的最终目的。

sentences.sentence: It would be called Fordlandia — ambitious, grandiose, and doomed from the beginning.
sentences.translation: 它将被命名为福特兰迪亚——雄心勃勃、宏大壮观，却从一开始就注定失败。

structure.text: ambitious, grandiose, and doomed from the beginning

difficult_points: It 指代前一句提到的 the largest rubber plantation（这一庞大的种植园计划）。
破折号后三个并列形容词短语补充评价这一计划的性质与结局。

sentences.sentence: The first mistake was to hire a rather untrustworthy Brazilian to scout for the best location in the Amazon, This man recommended a damp, rocky, and infertile series of hillsides near the Tapajos river, a tributary of the wide and mighty Amazon.
sentences.translation: 第一个错误是雇用了一个相当不可靠的巴西人去物色亚马逊地区的最佳地点；这个人推荐了塔帕若斯河附近一片潮湿、多石且贫瘠的丘陵地带——塔帕若斯河是浩瀚壮阔的亚马逊河的一条支流。

structure.text: to hire a rather untrustworthy Brazilian to scout for the best location in the Amazon
to scout for the best location in the Amazon
This man recommended a damp, rocky, and infertile series of hillsides near the Tapajos river
a tributary of the wide and mighty Amazon

difficult_points: 句子主干是 The first mistake was to hire...，不定式作表语说明这个错误的具体内容。
in the Amazon 后本应用句号，原文却用逗号连接 This man recommended...，属于逗号拼接的标点错误，此处按原文保留。
a tributary of the wide and mighty Amazon 是同位语，补充说明 Tapajos river 的身份。

sentences.sentence: In 1928, Ford blindly acquired a 10,000-square-kilometre concession and immediately ordered an immense amount of infrastructure to be built— at huge cost.
sentences.translation: 1928年，福特盲目地获得了一块一万平方公里的特许经营地，并立即下令兴建大量基础设施——耗资巨大。

structure.text: and immediately ordered an immense amount of infrastructure to be built

difficult_points: order + 宾语 + to be built 表示“下令建造……”，不定式为被动式。
blindly 修饰 acquired，暗示福特当初的决定缺乏审慎考察。

sentences.sentence: To this end, earth-moving equipment arrived, tractors, stump-pullers, trains, prefabricated living quarters, and food-making equipment.
sentences.translation: 为此，各种设备被运抵：推土设备、拖拉机、除根机、火车、预制住房以及食品加工设备。

structure.text: tractors, stump-pullers, trains, prefabricated living quarters, and food-making equipment

difficult_points: To this end 表示“为此目的”，承接上文基础设施建设的需要。
tractors 等并列名词是对 earth-moving equipment 的具体列举说明，属于同位语性质的补充。

sentences.sentence: The surface jungle was cleared, scores of Ford's employees were relocated, and out of this wilderness sprang an instant slice of America, complete with a modern hospital, library, hotels, ice cream makers, and row upon row of prefabricated houses positioned along nicely paved streets.
sentences.translation: 地表的丛林被清理干净，大批福特的员工被迁移到此，一片瞬间成形的“美国缩影”就此从这片荒野中拔地而起——配备了现代化医院、图书馆、旅馆、冰淇淋机，以及沿着铺设整齐的街道排列的一排排预制房屋。

structure.text: scores of Ford's employees were relocated
and out of this wilderness sprang an instant slice of America
complete with a modern hospital, library, hotels, ice cream makers, and row upon row of prefabricated houses

difficult_points: out of this wilderness sprang an instant slice of America 是倒装结构，正常语序为 an instant slice of America sprang out of this wilderness。
complete with 意为“配备有”，补充说明这个“美国缩影”社区的设施。
positioned along nicely paved streets 是过去分词短语，修饰 prefabricated houses。

sentences.sentence: The second big mistake was that, incredibly, Ford never thought to consult trained horticulturists.
sentences.translation: 第二个重大错误是，令人难以置信的是，福特竟从未想过去咨询专业的园艺师。

structure.text: that, incredibly, Ford never thought to consult trained horticulturists
Ford never thought to consult trained horticulturists

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，说明第二个错误具体是什么。
incredibly 是插入语，表达说话人的惊讶态度。

expressions.meaning_zh: 受过专业训练的园艺师

sentences.sentence: He naively assumed that his own company engineers, who had proven their worth in the production of cars, would prove equally adept at this agricultural endeavour.
sentences.translation: 他天真地以为，自己公司里那些已经在汽车生产中证明了自身能力的工程师，同样也能胜任这项农业事业。

structure.text: that his own company engineers, who had proven their worth in the production of cars, would prove equally adept at this agricultural endeavour
who had proven their worth in the production of cars
would prove equally adept at this agricultural endeavour

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，作 assumed 的宾语。
who 引导定语从句，修饰 engineers，插入在从句主谓之间。
prove adept at 表示“证明擅长/胜任于……”。

sentences.sentence: Thus, they planted the rubber trees thickly together, believing that they would nourish in their home environment.
sentences.translation: 因此，他们把橡胶树密密地种在一起，以为它们会像在原生环境中一样茁壮成长。

structure.text: planted the rubber trees thickly together
believing that they would nourish in their home environment
that they would nourish in their home environment

difficult_points: believing... 是现在分词短语作伴随状语，逻辑主语是 they（工程师们）。
that 引导宾语从句，作 believing 的宾语，从句中 they 指代 rubber trees。

sentences.sentence: However, in the Amazonian jungle, wild rubber trees are actually few and far between — a defence against the prodigious insect life which chews, drills, sucks, and bites.
sentences.translation: 然而，在亚马逊丛林中，野生橡胶树实际上分布得很稀疏——这是抵御各种啃咬、钻蛀、吸食昆虫的一种自我保护机制。

structure.text: are actually few and far between
a defence against the prodigious insect life
which chews, drills, sucks, and bites

difficult_points: few and far between 是固定表达，意为“稀少的；不常见的”。
a defence against... 是同位语，说明橡胶树分布稀疏这一现象本身的作用/意义。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 insect life，四个动词并列描述昆虫的破坏行为。

sentences.sentence: In such environments, monocultural farming approaches are dubious at best.
sentences.translation: 在这样的环境中，单一作物种植的方式充其量也只是效果存疑。
difficult_points: at best 表示“充其量、至多”，带有保留和怀疑的语气。
monocultural farming approaches 指前文提到的把橡胶树密集种植在一起的做法。

sentences.sentence: Ford's young rubber trees had no sooner appeared from the ground than they were attacked by caterpillars, ants, red spiders, and most significantly, South American leaf blight, which, to this day, limits the number of rubber plantations in this, the tree's native land.
sentences.translation: 福特种的幼小橡胶树刚从地里冒出来，就遭到了毛毛虫、蚂蚁、红蜘蛛，尤其是南美叶疫病的侵袭；时至今日，这种叶疫病仍然限制着橡胶树原产地——这里能开辟的橡胶种植园数量。

structure.text: had no sooner appeared from the ground
than they were attacked by caterpillars, ants, red spiders, and most significantly, South American leaf blight
which, to this day, limits the number of rubber plantations in this, the tree's native land

difficult_points: no sooner... than... 是固定句型，意为“一……就……”，强调两个动作紧接发生。
which 引导非限定性定语从句，修饰 South American leaf blight。
this 和 the tree's native land 是同位关系，都指亚马逊（橡胶树的原产地）。

sentences.sentence: The next problem was based on cultural differences.
sentences.translation: 接下来的问题源于文化差异。
difficult_points: be based on 表示“基于；源于”。
The next problem 承接上文的两个 mistake，引出第三类困难。

sentences.sentence: The newly planted fields needed hundreds of local workers, who, although well paid, were expected to follow Ford's patronising vision of a healthy lifestyle.
sentences.translation: 新开垦的田地需要数百名当地工人，尽管薪水不错，但他们被要求遵从福特那套居高临下式的“健康生活”理念。

structure.text: who, although well paid, were expected to follow Ford's patronising vision of a healthy lifestyle
were expected to follow Ford's patronising vision of a healthy lifestyle

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句，修饰 local workers，从句中插入了 although 让步状语。
although well paid 省略了主语和 be 动词，完整形式为 although they were well paid。
patronising 意为“居高临下的、施恩态度的”，暗含贬义，暗示福特把自己的价值观强加于工人。

sentences.sentence: Instead of the local custom of working before and after the roastingly hot middle of the day, Ford's workers were forced to do the standard company 9-to-5 shift.
sentences.translation: 当地习俗是在酷热的正午前后工作，但福特却强迫工人们遵循公司标准的朝九晚五班次。

structure.text: Instead of the local custom of working before and after the roastingly hot middle of the day
to do the standard company 9-to-5 shift

difficult_points: Instead of 引导对比状语，先说明当地原有的习俗，再转折说明福特的做法。
be forced to do 是被动结构，表示“被迫做某事”。

sentences.sentence: Similarly, they had to eat American food and take part in weekend activities considered sufficiently wholesome, such as poetry reading and square-dancing.
sentences.translation: 同样，他们还必须吃美式食物，并参加被认为足够“健康得体”的周末活动，比如诗歌朗诵和方块舞。

structure.text: and take part in weekend activities considered sufficiently wholesome
such as poetry reading and square-dancing

difficult_points: considered sufficiently wholesome 是过去分词短语，修饰 weekend activities，说明这些活动被谁（福特一方）判定为“健康得体”。
such as 举例说明具体是哪些活动。

expressions.meaning_zh: 有益身心的；健康得体的

sentences.sentence: Alcohol was strictly forbidden at work, in the housing estates, or within Fordlandia's sphere of influence.
sentences.translation: 无论是在工作场所、住宅区，还是在福特兰迪亚的势力范围内，酒精都被严格禁止。

structure.text: at work, in the housing estates, or within Fordlandia's sphere of influence

difficult_points: was forbidden 是被动语态，强调酒精“被禁止”这一状态。
at work, in the housing estates, or within... 三个并列介词短语，说明禁令覆盖的所有场所范围。

sentences.sentence: After a year denied their local customs, the disgruntled workers had had enough, and a riot followed, leaving the hapless American staff scurrying into the jungle to escape injury.
sentences.translation: 在被剥夺当地习俗满一年后，心怀不满的工人们再也无法忍受，一场暴乱随之爆发，吓得倒霉的美国员工们仓皇逃入丛林以躲避伤害。

structure.text: After a year denied their local customs
the disgruntled workers had had enough
leaving the hapless American staff scurrying into the jungle to escape injury

difficult_points: After a year denied... 中 denied 是过去分词，补充说明 a year 的性质，相当于 after a year in which they were denied their local customs。
leaving... 是现在分词短语作结果状语，说明暴乱带来的后果。
leaving...staff scurrying 是“leave+宾语+doing”结构，表示“使……处于……状态”。

sentences.sentence: It was all finally quelled with the arrival of the Brazilian army.
sentences.translation: 最终，随着巴西军队的到来，这场骚乱被彻底平息。

structure.text: with the arrival of the Brazilian army

difficult_points: It 指代前一句提到的 riot（暴乱）。
was quelled 是被动语态，表示“被平息”。

sentences.sentence: After three years, and no significant quantity of rubber to show for it all, Ford did what he should have done from the beginning—hired a trained horticulturist, who ultimately concluded that, in whatever manner the rubber trees were planted, the land was not appropriate for their cultivation.
sentences.translation: 三年过去，却没有产出多少橡胶作为回报，福特终于做了他本该从一开始就做的事——雇用了一位受过专业训练的园艺师；这位园艺师最终得出结论：无论用什么方式种植橡胶树，这片土地都不适合种植橡胶。

structure.text: After three years, and no significant quantity of rubber to show for it all
what he should have done from the beginning
who ultimately concluded that, in whatever manner the rubber trees were planted, the land was not appropriate for their cultivation
that, in whatever manner the rubber trees were planted, the land was not appropriate for their cultivation
in whatever manner the rubber trees were planted

difficult_points: what 引导宾语从句，作 did 的宾语，意为“他本该从一开始就做的事”。
hired a trained horticulturist 是对前面 what he should have done 的具体说明，同位语性质。
who 引导非限定性定语从句，修饰 horticulturist。
in whatever manner... 引导让步状语从句，意为“无论以怎样的方式”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 受过专业训练的园艺师

sentences.sentence: With such humiliating news, anyone less stubborn would have given up, yet Ford purchased another tract of land some fifty miles downstream of the Tapajos river—flatter, drier, better drained, and more suitable for machinery — and started all over again.
sentences.translation: 面对如此令人难堪的消息，换作不那么固执的人早就放弃了，然而福特却在塔帕若斯河下游大约五十英里处又买下了一片土地——那里更平坦、更干燥、排水更好，也更适合机械作业——然后一切从头再来。

structure.text: yet Ford purchased another tract of land some fifty miles downstream of the Tapajos river
flatter, drier, better drained, and more suitable for machinery

difficult_points: anyone less stubborn would have given up 是与事实相反的虚拟语气，暗示“如果换作别人早就放弃了”，反衬福特的固执。
yet 表转折，引出福特与常人不同的选择。
破折号后的形容词短语补充说明新买这片土地的特点。

sentences.sentence: This time, Ford imported blight-resistant Malaysian rubber trees, and much more horticultural expertise.
sentences.translation: 这一次，福特进口了抗叶疫病的马来西亚橡胶树，还引进了更多的园艺专业知识。

structure.text: blight-resistant Malaysian rubber trees, and much more horticultural expertise

difficult_points: This time 与前文福特第一次选址失败形成对比。
blight-resistant 是复合形容词，意为“抗叶疫病的”。

sentences.sentence: Still, 10 years later, in 1942, the operation could only produce a paltry 750 tons of latex rubber.Ford's factories were hoping for almost 40,000.
sentences.translation: 然而，十年之后的1942年，这一经营项目也只能生产出区区750吨乳胶橡胶，而福特的工厂原本盼望的产量接近四万吨。

structure.text: a paltry 750 tons of latex rubber

difficult_points: Still 在句首表转折，意为“然而、尽管如此”。
原文 rubber.Ford's 之间缺少空格，是两句被直接粘连在一起的排版错误，此处按原文保留。
40,000 承前省略了单位 tons，完整应为 almost 40,000 tons。

sentences.sentence: The final nail in the coffin was the development of synthetic rubber, and in 1945, it was time to admit defeat, although it was not Ford who did so.
sentences.translation: 压垮骆驼的最后一根稻草是合成橡胶的问世；到了1945年，是时候承认失败了，尽管承认失败的并不是福特本人。

structure.text: The final nail in the coffin
and in 1945, it was time to admit defeat
although it was not Ford who did so
it was not Ford who did so

difficult_points: the final nail in the coffin 是习语，字面“棺材上的最后一颗钉子”，比喻“压垮骆驼的最后一根稻草，最终致命的一击”。
it was time to do 表示“是时候做某事了”。
it was not Ford who did so 是强调句结构，强调“不是福特本人”做出了承认失败这件事。

expressions.text: the final nail in the coffin
expressions.meaning_zh: 最后一根稻草；致命一击

sentences.sentence: By that time he was old and ill and had relinquished control of his company to his grandson, Henry Ford II, who closed down the entire rubber operation.
sentences.translation: 到那时，他已年老体衰，并已将公司的控制权交给了孙子小亨利·福特，是后者关闭了整个橡胶经营项目。

structure.text: and had relinquished control of his company to his grandson
who closed down the entire rubber operation

difficult_points: was old and ill 与 had relinquished 是并列谓语，用不同时态分别描述状态和已完成的动作。
Henry Ford II 是同位语，说明 his grandson 的具体身份。
who 引导非限定性定语从句，修饰 Henry Ford II，说明是他关闭了整个项目。

sentences.sentence: The holdings were sold back to the Brazilian government for a pittance, leaving a loss of over $20 million (which would be over 10 times that much in today's terms) — a complete and utter financial disaster.
sentences.translation: 这些资产以极低的价格卖回给了巴西政府，造成了超过两千万美元的亏损（按今天的价值计算将是这个数字的十倍以上）——完全是一场彻头彻尾的财务灾难。

structure.text: to the Brazilian government for a pittance
leaving a loss of over $20 million
which would be over 10 times that much in today's terms
a complete and utter financial disaster

difficult_points: were sold back 是被动语态，表示这些资产“被卖回”。
leaving... 是现在分词短语作结果状语，说明交易导致的后果。
which 引导非限定性定语从句，修饰 $20 million，说明这一数额换算到今天的价值。
破折号后的名词短语是对整个事件的总结性同位语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 按今天的价值/标准换算
